channel.title: ID on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in ID on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Kootenai County Sheriff’s Office (ID)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Kootenai County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: August 28, 2025 County: Kootenai County State: ID FIPS: 16055

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: 287(g) TFM: Idaho State Police Department (ID)
